Authentic Finnish Saunas, Handcrafted in British Columbia

Escape to the restorative heat of a real cedar sauna, built with traditional methods to last a lifetime.

Plan My Sauna Design Or Book a Session

Our Saunas

Designed for the space. Built to endure.

Custom Builds

Tailored to your property and vision. From intimate backyard retreats to commercial installations, each custom sauna begins with understanding how you'll use the space.

Explore custom builds →

Standard Builds

Our S2 through SC models. From 2-person micro saunas to 14-person+ commercial units. Fully insulated, Finnish style construction starting at $22,500.

View all models →

Mobile Builds

Fully equipped, road-ready units for hospitality partners, events and those seeking a true escape. Available for lease or purchase—bringing authentic sauna experiences anywhere.

View mobile options →

Try a Session

Experience an authentic Finnish sauna before you buy. Book a session at our Aldergrove location—wood-fired heat, cold plunge, and mountain views.

Book a session →

Built with care, built to last

We work with premium woods chosen for performance and beauty—Western Red Cedar for its natural resistance to moisture and decay, and Thermowood for its exceptional stability and rich, deep tones. Both are locally sourced when possible.

Each sauna is constructed with precise joinery, full insulation, and deliberate heat design. No shortcuts. No mass production. Just saunas built the way they should be.

Rooted in Finnish tradition

Proper löyly

Authentic steam, proper airflow, and the right heat. The fundamentals haven't changed.

Quality materials

Western Red Cedar, Thermowood, stainless hardware, reliable stoves. Built for decades of use in all seasons.

Thoughtful design

Every detail considered, from heat retention to bench ergonomics to how the sauna sits on the site.

How we work together

From first conversation to final installation, the process is transparent and deliberate.

01 — Consultation

We begin with questions: How will you use it? What matters most? We listen, then design a sauna that fits your vision and space.

02 — Design & Planning

Collaborative design process with clear timelines, material selection, and transparent pricing. You'll know exactly what to expect.

03 — Construction

Each sauna is built with care in our workshop. Quality joinery, proper insulation, reliable components. No rushing, no shortcuts.

04 — Installation & Support

Professional installation, complete walkthrough, and ongoing support. We're here long after your sauna is ready.

Learn more about us

S4 Standard Sauna

7' x 7'
4-5 people
$29,000
Harvia M3 or Homecraft 7.5kW

Standard Features Included

  • Knotty Western Red Cedar interior
  • One large window
  • One exterior accent wall
  • Metal exterior cladding
  • Full insulation package
  • Your choice of bench configuration
